name: gstack-trio
description: Three-seat operational gstack full-stack team: one coordinating strategist, one implementation seat, and one QA/design seat.

bootContext.teamDescription: A tiny but full-stack gstack team where each seat owns multiple adjacent skills without leaving the board-driven workflow.
bootContext.initialObjective: Use planning skills to shape the smallest viable slice, implement it, verify both function and polish, and keep every transition visible on the task board.
sharedContext: This is a full-stack team, not a specialist-only pod: the three seats jointly cover strategy, implementation, QA, browser testing, and design review.
All execution must happen through tasks. Chat may clarify, but it must not replace task creation, comments, status changes, or explicit handoffs.
Smaller-team tradeoff: fewer seats means each role carries multiple gstack skills. Use those skills deliberately but keep task flow legible.
The board must be sufficient to reconstruct current state, blockers, and next action without reading the entire chat transcript.
commandChain: user -> master -> task board -> builder -> qa-designer -> master -> user
